latest.title: Online gamblers betting more than £1,000 to face new checks
latest.summary: UK online gamblers who bet more than £1,000 in a day will face new background checks. The checks will use credit-reference data, but regulators say they are not affordability checks.
latest.details: UK online gamblers who bet more than £1,000 in a day will face new background checks. The same will apply to people spending more than £3,000 over 90 days.

latest.title: Woman suspected of Monaco bomb attack found dead in Ukraine
latest.summary: A Ukrainian woman suspected of planting a bomb in Monaco has been found dead in Ukraine. Officials had launched a cross-border search after the apartment-building attack.
latest.details: A Ukrainian woman suspected of planting a bomb in Monaco has been found dead in Ukraine. Authorities say her body was found with gunshot wounds to the head.

latest.title: One million more UK homeowners set to face higher mortgages
latest.summary: The Bank of England says more UK homeowners are likely to see mortgage payments rise by 2028. The pressure is wider than previously expected, but less severe than recent shocks.
latest.details: The Bank of England says just over five million UK homeowners could face higher mortgage payments by the end of 2028. That is about one million more than its earlier forecast.

latest.title: Explosions injure 18 in Damascus during Macron's visit
latest.summary: Two explosions in Damascus injured 18 people during Emmanuel Macron's visit. Syrian media said the devices exploded while specialised units were trying to defuse them.
latest.details: Two explosions in Damascus injured 18 people during Emmanuel Macron's visit. One device was reportedly placed in a parked vehicle and another in a bin.

latest.title: Zimbabwean football star survives gun attack in South Africa
latest.summary: Zimbabwe footballer Divine Lunga survived a gun attack in Johannesburg. Local reports say he was driving when an unknown gunman shot at his car.
latest.details: Zimbabwe footballer Divine Lunga survived a gun attack in Johannesburg. He escaped unharmed after his car was shot at in the Hillbrow area.

latest.title: Public to be asked who should pay for social care as part of major review
latest.summary: The UK public will be asked how social care should be funded. The review looks at who should pay for support in an ageing society.
latest.details: The UK public will be asked how social care should be funded. The government has commissioned a review after dropping earlier plans for a lifetime cap on care costs.

latest.title: E-bike injury payouts top £110m and push up insurance premiums
latest.summary: E-bike injury claims in the UK have led to payouts of more than £110m. Insurers say the cost of claims is helping push up premiums.
latest.details: E-bike injury claims in the UK have led to payouts of more than £110m. The biggest single payout was £20m, and insurers say these costs affect premiums.

latest.title: Two tests GPs can soon offer to help spot endometriosis
latest.summary: GPs may soon be able to offer two non-invasive tests for endometriosis. Experts hope the tests will shorten the long wait many patients face for diagnosis.
latest.details: GPs may soon be able to offer two non-invasive tests for endometriosis. One is a saliva test that looks for genetic material linked to the condition.

latest.title: Erika Kirk comes face-to-face in court with husband's alleged killer
latest.summary: Erika Kirk appeared in court as prosecutors presented evidence against Tyler Robinson. The hearing will decide whether Robinson should stand trial.
latest.details: Erika Kirk appeared in court as prosecutors presented evidence against Tyler Robinson. The hearing is expected to continue through the week.

latest.title: Samsung profits jump 1,800% as AI chip sales soar
latest.summary: Samsung expects a sharp profit jump as demand for AI chips rises. The update is an early signal before the company publishes full quarterly results.
latest.details: Samsung expects a sharp profit jump as demand for AI chips rises. Investors watch the update because Samsung is one of the world's key chip suppliers.

latest.title: Watch: Moment rare tornado lashes central Chinese cities
latest.summary: Videos show a rare tornado hitting the Chinese cities of Ezhou and Huanggang. A student said flying glass injured several people.
latest.details: Videos show a rare tornado hitting the Chinese cities of Ezhou and Huanggang. One student said the storm suddenly sent objects flying outside a dormitory window.

latest.title: India's landmark Ram temple overhauls board after alleged theft of donations
latest.summary: The trust running India's Ram temple changed its leadership after alleged theft of donations. The temple is one of India's most important pilgrimage sites.
latest.details: The trust running India's Ram temple changed its leadership after alleged theft of donations. The temple attracts tens of millions of visitors each year.
